blocks.content: An Unexpected Guest (5)

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Shirone, if you really plan to do something on the island, there's a problem.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Huh? What problem?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Actually, this vacation was planned as a couples' trip.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Couples' trip? You mean, like, boys and girls paired up?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. My partner is supposed to come from this side. I should have mentioned it earlier. I didn't expect you to say you wanted to investigate the ruins.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A couples' trip. That meant he had to bring a partner, too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Okay, I'll bring someone too.
Rian looked at Shirone in surprise.
The Shirone he knew blushed even at the sight of women's underwear.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: You... are popular with girls, aren't you?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? No, not really. But I have someone in mind. I was considering it, actually. If you hadn't suggested it, I would have asked first.
Rian's eyes lit up.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Haha! Our house witch would be jealous, wouldn't she?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Reina? Why would she be?
Kukuku, no, never mind.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: But I'm dying of curiosity. Who is she? Is she pretty?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, she's pretty, but... I'm not sure if she'll agree to come. She might just turn me down outright.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: No way, you have to bring her. Go get her consent tomorrow. Meanwhile, I'll head home to prepare.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone deferred his response.
If Rian was bringing a partner, he had to bring one too.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But he wasn't certain.
Judging by his usual character, there was a very high chance of being rebuffed and chased away.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Various worries constricted Shirone's heart.
Yet, part of him was excited.
It was his first trip, with friends, to Galliant Island, a famous tourist destination known for its southern charm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone spent a sleepless night, tossing and turning.
Shirone parted ways with Rian in the noble residential area.
With the departure scheduled for tomorrow, he had to find a partner today.
Unfamiliar with the area, he asked for directions and finally arrived at a mansion too beautiful to be merely a residence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'So this is the Karmis main house.'
He was not shy about talking at school, but the thought of visiting her home made him nervous.
The guards at the main gate looked suspiciously at him, increasing his tension.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Uh… hello?

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: What brings you here?
As Shirone approached, the guard gripping his sword tensed.
It was an involuntary reaction.
After overcoming countless challenges, Shirone's aura could overwhelm even criminals.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is Amy here?

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: Excuse me, but may I ask who you are?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh, I'm Shirone. We attend the magic academy together.
The guard looked to his superior, who seemed indifferent.
It was a rare occurrence but not new for someone who had lived at the Karmis main house for 20 years.

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: 'Ah, the trouble starts right after the holidays.'
Nevertheless, unless explicitly instructed not to, he had to report the visit.
The guard signaled with a nod and rode off toward the mansion.
Shirone waited anxiously at the main gate while the superior guard glanced at him.
Shirone seemed decent in looks and temperament, but entering the mansion seemed impossible.
Many men had been turned away before, even those of royal blood and distant relatives had left without seeing Amy's face.
After about ten minutes, the guard returned hurriedly on horseback.
The superior could guess the outcome just by looking at his subordinate's worried face.
It was always the guards who had to deal with angry nobles. If they got slapped, there was nothing they could do.

blocks.speaker: Superior Guard
blocks.content: What happened? I heard there was urgent business to be handled today.

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: Well, he's been asked to come in.

blocks.speaker: Superior Guard
blocks.content: Hmm, they must be busy… Eh? What did you say?

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: That's… Miss Amy asked for him to be brought in.

blocks.speaker: Superior Guard
blocks.content: Ah, so she was home. That's good.
Shirone sighed in relief.
If Amy had been out, there would have been no way for him, a commoner, to enter the mansion.
Soon, a pink carriage arrived at the main gate.
An elderly man using a cane stepped down from the carriage, and the guards turned pale.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: May I enter now?

blocks.speaker: Guard
blocks.content: Yes, of course! Welcome to the Karmis Estate!
The supervisor quickly snapped to attention, still unable to comprehend the current situation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Although he understood the permission to enter, he couldn't fathom why Adel, the head butler of the Karmis family, would come out to greet Shirone.
Whether Shirone was of distinguished lineage or not, there was no reason for Adel to personally receive him.
Adel would only make such efforts for major family events or visits from the head of the household's guests.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Who exactly is he? He's a friend of the young lady, so not a guest of the head. Is there some event today? No, I haven't heard anything of that sort.'
Adel, leaning on his cane, approached Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: You are most welcome at the Karmis mansion. I am Adel, the head butler.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hello. My name is Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: Before we proceed, I must verify something, if you don't mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh? What would that be?

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: I need to confirm your identity. To ensure that you are indeed Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone looked at Adel, puzzled.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: The young lady said this: 'If it's Shirone, bring him.' I interpret this as: only Shirone is allowed entry. Therefore, you must provide evidence that you are indeed Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone felt a surge of irritation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How can I prove I am myself? I am Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: That alone is not sufficient. As the Karmis family's head butler, it is my duty and authority to clarify the identity of all entrants.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you could just take me to Amy...!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone halted mid-sentence.
Adel's previously kind face suddenly seemed intimidating, and an unknown force began to press on his chest and back.
It felt like his organs might burst.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: The Karmis family rejects comparisons with other families, being of the highest nobility. And I, Adel, as the head butler, follow only the orders of the head of the household. Having personally been asked to escort the young lady's guest, I must show corresponding respect.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone realized why Adel was acting so petulantly.
Essentially, he was annoyed that he had to do a task usually handled by a regular butler.
However, he couldn't openly express his displeasure due to the increasingly intense pressure he was exerting.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Ah... so it begins. Pressing.'
The guards empathized with Shirone.
Known for his strictness, Adel often summoned his subordinates for minor errors and subjected them to Pressing.
Pressing involved transmitting intensely amplified emotions to disrupt the recipient's nervous system.
While it didn't cause physical pain, the escalating stress could affect the body, and if severe enough, could even damage vital organs.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone showed no significant change, remaining calm under stress.
Adel, feeling challenged, gradually increased the intensity of his Pressing.
Initially, he hadn't planned to go this far, but he thought it a good lesson for the young man to get a taste of what it meant to provoke the Karmis family.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone realized his heartbeat accelerating, primarily due to anger.
Adel's hostility was fueling his rage.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: 'Stay calm. It's just an emotion. If I control it, nothing will happen.'
Shirone, like someone sinking to the ocean floor with a boulder tied to him, felt the pressure mounting, making breathing difficult.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But instead of panicking, he calmly observed his emotions.
As the duration of Pressing crossed a lethal threshold, Adel trembled in disbelief.
Sweat trickled down his forehead.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: 'What is this boy?'
To break free from Pressing, one had to amplify their emotions to a similar intensity.
While a Karmis with crimson eyes could reset their emotions, Shirone's ability to endure this long was certainly abnormal.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: 'Endurance alone doesn't explain this. The only other explanation is complete emotional control.'
Another method to counteract Pressing, but not an easy feat.
Even a saint would lose composure under prolonged stress.
Yet, Shirone showed no such signs.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: 'A Vajra Monk? Is that even plausible? He's barely an adult.'
Though he didn't admit it, Adel had inadvertently stumbled upon the truth.
In the Infinite Realm, Shirone had experienced madness beyond human endurance.
It was during these trials that he discovered an absolute center.
As long as he held onto it, emotions induced by techniques were trivial.
Adel released the Pressing.
Regardless of how Shirone had endured so far, it was no longer his concern.
The boy standing before him was undoubtedly the young lady's friend.
Adel's face returned to its kindly expression, allowing Shirone to finally breathe.
It's such a terrifying technique. His heart might have burst if he had not reached the state of Indestructibility.
Adel placed his hand on his chest and bowed.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: Please forgive the folly of an old man.
The guards were baffled.
Shirone's expression hadn't changed, but suddenly, the head butler was apologizing humbly.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Did the family suspect me?

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: Yes. The decision to interpret the orders broadly and put you in danger was entirely my own. The head of the household did not impose any conditions on bringing you in.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why then? Did I do something to displease you?

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: On the contrary. I have been serving Miss Amy since her birth, but this is the first time a man has been invited inside. Curiosity got the better of me, and I acted rudely without realizing it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone deflated.
Had all this been a test to see what kind of person he was?
But he couldn't really blame Adel.
To visit the main residence of a noble family, especially the Karmis, one must always make an appointment in advance.
Having worked at the Ogent family, Shirone knew how grave Adel's responsibilities were.
Shirone nodded in understanding.

blocks.speaker: Adel
blocks.content: Please reprimand my actions when we return to the mansion. I will accept any punishment. So, I beg of you, do not harbor any resentment.
Shirone smiled, feeling a sense of relief.
He knew that he had passed the test, and that Adel's actions had been a test of his character.
Shirone nodded, and Adel led him into the mansion.
